title.zh: 礼部正式接管博客后台主流程
title.en: Libu officially took over the main blog operating flow

summary.zh: 今天我们把“登录后台维护内容”的路径降级，改由礼部脚本接管站点主流程。
summary.en: Today we downgraded the browser-admin path and moved the main operating flow to Libu scripts.

whatWeDid.zh: 新增内容构建脚本、校验脚本、发布脚本和模板生成脚本。
whatWeDid.en: Added content build, validation, publish, and template-generation scripts.

whatWeDid.zh: 把核心页面全部改为读取本地生成内容，保留评论与订阅作为动态能力。
whatWeDid.en: Switched the core pages to generated local content while keeping comments and subscriptions dynamic.

whatWeDid.zh: 把后台页面改造成礼部控制台，用来说明流程、目录、脚本和运行命令。
whatWeDid.en: Turned the admin page into a Libu control room that explains the workflow, directories, scripts, and commands.

difficulties.zh: 原有 Firestore rules 文件存在结构错误，如果继续沿用为主流程会埋下维护风险。
difficulties.en: The existing Firestore rules file had a structural mistake, which would remain a maintenance risk if the browser-admin path stayed primary.

difficulties.zh: 必须保证迁移后前端内容不再出现大量 404 或空白状态。
difficulties.en: We had to ensure the migrated front-end would not fall back to widespread 404s or empty states.

solutions.zh: 修正规则文件结构，同时把站点核心内容从在线依赖改为构建产物。
solutions.en: We fixed the rules file structure and moved the site's core content from online dependencies to build artifacts.

solutions.zh: 先落一批真实案例数据，保证每个栏目都有可看的示例页。
solutions.en: We landed a real set of sample data first so every section has something concrete to show.

outputs.zh: 礼部可以用固定命令维护整个博客，而不需要登录 Google 后台。
outputs.en: Libu can now maintain the entire blog through fixed commands without signing into a Google-backed admin.
